description_long: This nightstand is a cubic, blocky piece of furniture crafted from a medium-brown wood with a rich, natural grain pattern. The front face features a large, dark geometric diamond pattern inlaid or printed onto the wood, adding a bold decorative accent. The top is flat and broad, suitable for placing lamps, books, or other small items. The sides and back are plain, with the same wood grain finish but without any visible hardware or openings. There are no visible handles, drawers, or legs, giving the nightstand a monolithic, modern appearance. The overall construction appears solid and sturdy, with sharp, clean edges and a seamless finish.
description: A solid, blocky wooden nightstand with a geometric diamond pattern on the front and a smooth, flat top. It has a modern, monolithic design with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent diamond pattern on the face and the flat, wide top surface.
description_view_1: Side view with the same wood grain finish, lacking any decorative pattern or hardware.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with plain wood grain and no visible features.
description_view_3: Rear view, plain and unadorned, showing only the wood grain texture.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside a bed
